results.title: Dovetail joint — Wikipedia
results.judge_reason: Source-domain encyclopedic description of the dovetail joint itself; covers slope, tails/pins, tensile wedging but contains no LLM/tool-chain analogue, so it cannot anticipate the cross-domain mapping.

results.title: Dogmatic About Dovetail Angles — Lost Art Press
results.judge_reason: Pure source-domain woodworking commentary on dovetail slope tradeoffs without any LLM or schema-design transfer.

results.title: Dovetail Layout: Ratio or Degree — Popular Woodworking
results.judge_reason: Source-domain article on hardwood vs softwood dovetail angle calibration; remains on the woodworking side with no schema-pipeline analogy.

results.title: PARSE: Schema Optimization for Entity Extraction (2025/10)
results.judge_reason: Argues static JSON schemas are suboptimal and calls for schema-tolerance adjustment, which conceptually overlaps the schema-slope-calibration claim though not parameterized by downstream-tool hardness.

results.title: Generating Structured Outputs: Benchmark + Studies (2025/1)
results.judge_reason: Explicitly analyses over- vs under-constrained schemas as a strictness tradeoff, paralleling the calibration logic of the candidate without the wood-hardness analogue or per-tool calibration knob.

results.title: CRANE: Constrained LLM Generation (2025/2)
results.judge_reason: Discusses downstream tool constraint compliance for LLM outputs, overlapping the tool-chain/downstream-robustness framing though without a calibrated slope parameter.

results.title: Schema Reinforcement Learning (2025/2)
results.judge_reason: Focuses on RL-trained validators enforcing strict JSON validity; orthogonal to the candidate's calibrated-slack concept.

results.title: Non-Invasive Constrained Generation (2024/3 / 2026/1)
results.judge_reason: Discusses minimally invasive constrained decoding and token-alignment loss; tangential to a per-tool-calibrated schema slope.
